title: Fix curve geometry + track closure
description: CircularArc.point() formula is wrong (SW instead of NE for CCW from east). ClothoidCurve.point() ignores theta0 and k<0. Fix both, then add constraint-based track closure in compose_full. Redesign DemoTrack as proper closed circuit.
close_reason: Geometry fixed, demo track closed, AUTO/MANUAL closure algorithm added

title: Optimize scan/status polling: adaptive interval + log filter
description: Каждый клиент поллит /api/scan/status раз в секунду постоянно, даже в простое — линейный рост нагрузки и спам в логах werkzeug. Сделать поллинг адаптивным (1с во время скана, реже в простое) и отфильтровать access-логи этого эндпоинта.
close_reason: Adaptive polling (1s active / 8s idle) + werkzeug log filter; 57 tests pass

title: Resource status + IP from CMDB 'IP' CI type
description: Статус ресурса и IP-адрес лежат в КЕ типа 'IP' (атрибуты state, address), связь с HOST/VM по shorthost. Заменить старый источник resource_status (HOST/VM.status) на IP.state. Прокинуть IP в /api/data и показать tooltip с IP при наведении на хостнейм.
close_reason: IP CI type as source for resource_status + ip_address; tooltip; 55 tests pass

title: Feature 3: On-demand ping probe on host click
description: POST /api/ping {shorthost}; restrict to hosts in _rows; DNS-resolve shorthost then system ping (shell=False); return alive/ip/rtt. Frontend: click shorthost -> spinner -> online/offline badge.
close_reason: Ping probe endpoint + frontend click-to-ping implemented, 51 tests pass

title: Feature 2: Resource status indicator from CMDB status attr
description: Read 'status' attribute from HOST/VM CIs, add resource_status to ReportRow, new table column with colored badge + filter dropdown + /api/resource_statuses endpoint.
close_reason: Feature 2 resource status indicator implemented, 44 tests pass

title: Feature 1: In-app CMDB rescan with live progress
description: Implement rescan trigger + global live progress banner per spec 2026-06-02-in-app-rescan-design.md and plan 2026-06-02-in-app-rescan.md. 6 TDD tasks: progress callbacks, ScanProgress, load_data refactor, scan endpoints, frontend banner/polling, manual verify.
notes: Tasks 1-5 complete & committed (38 passing tests). Backend fully verified: progress callbacks, ScanProgress, load_data refactor, _run_scan + /api/scan/start (202/409) + /api/scan/status, frontend button/banner/polling. Task 6 (live browser verification of banner fill across 7 phases + auto-refresh + multi-tab) PENDING — requires running app.py against live CMDB; not triggered to avoid a real multi-minute prod scan.

title: In-app scan + resource status + live nmap probe
description: Three UX features for the compliance Flask app: (1) trigger CMDB rescan from the web UI with a live progress bar instead of restarting the server; (2) collect the 'status' attribute from HOST/VM CIs and show a resource-state indicator; (3) on-demand nmap/ping of a host when the user clicks it, to verify liveness when CMDB status isn't trusted.

title: OS compliance checker: анализ ОС в HOST и VM КЕ CMDB по регламенту
description: Разработать standalone Python-скрипт, который: (1) Получает все КЕ типа HOST из CMDB через API /ci/full/, (2) Получает все КЕ типа VM из CMDB через API /ci/full/, (3) Для дублирующихся shorthost — оставляет os_name из HOST (приоритет HOST), (4) Проверяет каждый os_name по регламенту допустимых ОС, (5) Выводит отчёт о несоответствующих ресурсах. Регламент: Linux — AlmaLinux 9+, Debian 12+, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS+, RHEL 9+. Windows Client — Windows 11 23H2+. Windows Server — 2022+.

Убрать блок 'if owner == N/A → lebowski_lookup' и lebowski_filled (опционально оставить переменную для других целей, согласовать).

Make them clickable to set the diff filter, mirroring the main table's status cards. Click worse->worsened, better->improved, newc->new, remc->removed; reuse setDiffFilter logic and toggle .filter-btn[data-diff] active state.

value: UI preference: avoid emoji in the interface. If a glyph is needed, use an inline SVG icon instead of an emoji. Applies to the compliance_app Flask UI (buttons, tabs, banners) and any new frontend work.
